title: senna polyphylla
intro: Senna polyphylla, also known as Himalayan senna, is a plant species belonging to the legume family, native to the Himalayan region. The medicinal properties of Senna polyphylla include its ability to stimulate bowel movements and treat constipation due to its anthraquinone content, which acts as a laxative. This plant offers various health benefits, such as treating digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Senna polyphylla is often prepared as a herbal tea or capsule by steeping its leaves in hot water or using them in a powdered form, and it is commonly used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine.
